name: Trout Crepes
recipeInstructions:
1. For the crepes: Mix the egg, water, and flour ingredients thoroughly and let rest for at least 1 hour.
2. Heat a 6-inch skillet with a little butter until almost smoking. Pour enough batter to thinly cover the bottom of the pan, tipping it to spread evenly to the edges. Cook over medium heat, turning when bubbles appear on the surface; cook the other side until lightly browned. Repeat to make 20 crepes and set aside.
3. In a separate saucepan, cook onion and garlic in butter until onion is tender. Remove from heat and blend in flour, salt, and pepper. Cook over low heat, stirring until bubbly. Stir in milk and Sauterne. Bring to a boil and stir for 1 minute. Stir in trout pieces.
4. Fill each crepe with about 2 tablespoons of the filling. Place the crepes in an oven preheated to 350 degrees Fahrenheit and heat for 10 minutes. Serve topped with remaining filling.
